prompt:
Analyze the following text and extract ALL temporal information.

For each date or time reference found, provide:
- The date string (in YYYY-MM-DD format when possible)
- A Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) if the date is specific enough
- A brief context describing what the date refers to

For intervals (e.g. "from 2016 to 2019", "between March and June"), provide:
- start and end timestamps
- context

Also determine the overall time span of the text:
- start_ts: earliest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)
- end_ts: latest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)

Text:
"""[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "Hey Mel! Good to see you! How have you been?"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Hey Caroline! Good to see you! I'm swamped with the kids & work. What's up with you? Anything new?"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "I went to a LGBTQ support group yesterday and it was so powerful."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, that's cool, Caroline! What happened that was so awesome? Did you hear any inspiring stories?"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "The transgender stories were so inspiring! I was so happy and thankful for all the support."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, love that painting! So cool you found such a helpful group. What's it done for you?"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "The support group has made me feel accepted and given me courage to embrace myself."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "That's really cool. You've got guts. What now?"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "Gonna continue my edu and check out career options, which is pretty exciting!"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, Caroline! What kinda jobs are you thinkin' of? Anything that stands out?"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "I'm keen on counseling or working in mental health - I'd love to support those with similar issues."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "You'd be a great counselor! Your empathy and understanding will really help the people you work with. By the way, take a look at this."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "Thanks, Melanie! That's really sweet. Is this your own painting?"
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Yeah, I painted that lake sunrise last year! It's special to me."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "Wow, Melanie! The colors really blend nicely. Painting looks like a great outlet for expressing yourself."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Thanks, Caroline! Painting's a fun way to express my feelings and get creative. It's a great way to relax after a long day."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Caroline said: "Totally agree, Mel. Relaxing and expressing ourselves is key. Well, I'm off to go do some research."
[1:56 pm on 8 May, 2023] Melanie said: "Yep, Caroline. Taking care of ourselves is vital. I'm off to go swimming with the kids. Talk to you soon!""""

Return JSON:
```json
{{
    "dates": [
        {{
            "date_str": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "timestamp": <unix timestamp as float or null>,
            "context": "brief description of what this date refers to"
        }}
    ],
    "intervals": [
        {{
            "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "start_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "end_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "context": "brief description"
        }}
    ],
    "start_ts": <earliest unix timestamp or null>,
    "end_ts": <latest unix timestamp or null>
}}
```

If no temporal information is found, return empty lists and null timestamps.

JSON Output: /no_think
